pages.text: Place a valid hide stage on the rack, then hit it with the required tool from recipe. Progress is measured in hits.
Each hit consumes tool durability. Some recipes may fail on hit and produce failure output instead.

pages.title: Warnings
pages.text: $(#E5C95A)Check recipe failure chance before processing.$() On each hit, there is a chance to fail and convert into $(#D94B4B)failure output$().
